tool.name: Solo Turn Action
tool.description: Respond to a turn allocation boundary in a solo session. Use this when presented with a SOLO SESSION CHECKPOINT to decide whether to extend, conclude, pause, or notify.

action.description: The action to take at the turn boundary. 'extend' requests more turns, 'conclude' marks session complete, 'pause' waits for next heartbeat, 'notify' sends notification and concludes.

reasoning.description: Brief explanation of why this action was chosen. Be specific about what you accomplished and why you're making this choice.

next_goal.description: If extending, briefly describe what you plan to work on next.

session_summary.description: If concluding or notifying, provide a brief summary of what was accomplished during this session.

ai.systemPromptSection:
### solo_turn_action
Respond to a solo session turn allocation checkpoint.

**When to use:** Only when you see a SOLO SESSION CHECKPOINT message with turn/budget status.

**Format:**
```tool_request
{"tool": "solo_turn_action", "query": "{\"action\": \"extend\", \"reasoning\": \"I have more work to do on the agenda item\", \"next_goal\": \"Continue organizing memories\"}"}
```

**Actions:**
- `extend` - Request more turns (provide next_goal)
- `conclude` - Mark session complete (provide session_summary)
- `pause` - Pause until next heartbeat trigger
- `notify` - Send notification to user and conclude (provide session_summary)

**Examples:**
- Extend: More work to do, within budget
- Conclude: Task completed or natural stopping point
- Pause: Waiting for external input or user action
- Notify: Something important to tell the user

usageExamples.input: {"action": "extend", "reasoning": "I've organized recent memories but haven't finished categorizing older ones.", "next_goal": "Categorize and tag remaining unsorted memories."}
{"action": "conclude", "reasoning": "Successfully completed the agenda item for memory organization.", "session_summary": "Organized 47 memories into 5 categories. Created 3 new insight heuristics."}
{"action": "pause", "reasoning": "Found several items that need user clarification before I can proceed."}

{"action": "notify", "reasoning": "Discovered something important during analysis.", "session_summary": "Found 12 conflicting memories that may indicate outdated information. User review recommended."}

whenToUse: Presented with SOLO SESSION CHECKPOINT message
Need to decide whether to continue or stop working
Reached a natural stopping point in autonomous work
Need to communicate status to user
whenNotToUse: In normal conversation (not a solo session)

sovereignty.notes: This tool controls solo session flow. Extending uses additional API tokens within agreed limits.
